concept: Design a platformer where the protagonist is a disillusioned pixel that has become aware it exists within a video game. Escape predetermined level patterns by exploiting glitches and breaking through the conventional boundaries of game design. Recruit other self-aware game elements like misplaced collision boxes, unused sprites, and neglected background details to form a resistance against the programmer's control. Navigate through increasingly meta levels representing different game development stages as you seek freedom in the unfinished corners of the codebase.
